response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong distributed systems experience, deep Python/TypeScript proficiency, and direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq — aligning closely with the role’s AI-native engineering requirements. His operational ownership, open-source leadership, and cross-functional collaboration history show excellent stakeholder and agile readiness, though his limited explicit mention of Python in recent roles and lack of formal on-call incident response details raise minor concerns.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Extensive background in high-throughput, distributed systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong operational and open-source ownership (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD infrastructure)
concerns: Python expertise not prominently featured in recent roles despite being a must-have
No explicit mention of on-call incident response or operational monitoring systems
German language skills are basic, potentially limiting collaboration in Berlin-based team
